recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuY3VzdG9tZXIgaW1wb3J0IEN1c3RvbWVyCgpjdXN0b21lciA9IEN1c3RvbWVyKCJMaW5hIikKcHJpbnQoY3VzdG9tZXIubmFtZSkK',
    'models/customer.py': 'Y2xhc3MgQ3VzdG9tZXI6CiAgICBkZWYgX19pbml0X18oc2VsZiwgbmFtZSk6CiAgICAgICAgc2VsZi5uYW1lID0gbmFtZQo=',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")

from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuY2FydCBpbXBvcnQgQ2FydAoKY2FydCA9IENhcnQoKQpjYXJ0LmFkZF9pdGVtKCJQZW4iLCAyKQpjYXJ0LmFkZF9pdGVtKCJCYWciLCA1KQpwcmludChjYXJ0LnN1bW1hcnkoKSkK',

}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():

    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")
